subcodes.first_line: O Persian friend! Divine confirmations have brought thee to the Holy Land and honored thee with tending the garden of paradise; render thou thanksgiving [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار پارسی توفیق الهی ترا بارض مقدس رساند و بباغبانی باغ فردوس مشرف ساخت شکر
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @thankfulness; gratitude
